title: A Gentle Guardian
lines: CRACK! You swing the barbed-wire bat with a desperate roar. The rusted metal bites into the lion's skull, and the beast crumples into the dirt.
You don't wait for it to get up. You sprint through the exit of the lion exhibit and find yourself in a quiet, sun-drenched petting area.
A large, calm Capybara sits by a small pond, seemingly invisible to the zombies. It looks at you with ancient, peaceful eyes.
It nudges a hidden latch on the back gate with its nose. You slip through the fence and into the safety of the woods beyond.
The Capybara remains behind, a silent guardian of the sanctuary.
